const API_BASE='/api';export const reportsApi={// Get all reports with optional filtering
getReports:async params=>{const searchParams=new URLSearchParams();if(params!==null&&params!==void 0&&params.month)searchParams.append('month',params.month);if(params!==null&&params!==void 0&&params.limit)searchParams.append('limit',params.limit.toString());if(params!==null&&params!==void 0&&params.offset)searchParams.append('offset',params.offset.toString());const response=await fetch("".concat(API_BASE,"/reports?").concat(searchParams));if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to fetch reports');return response.json();},// Create or update a report
createReport:async data=>{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_BASE,"/reports"),{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify(data)});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to create report');return response.json();},// Get dashboard statistics
getStats:async()=>{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_BASE,"/reports/stats"));if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to fetch stats');return response.json();},// Get rollup data for charts
getRollups:async function(){let group=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:'month';const response=await fetch("".concat(API_BASE,"/reports/rollups?group=").concat(group));if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to fetch rollups');return response.json();},// Clear all data
clearAll:async()=>{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_BASE,"/reports"),{method:'DELETE'});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to clear data');}};
